# Buster -- first encounter (solo battle)

alias buster npc5

label LakeElixSouth_Buster
trainerbattle_double TRAINER_ROCKET_BUSTER_1, LakeElixSouth_Buster_FullIntro, LakeElixSouth_Buster_Defeat1, LakeElixSouth_NotEnoughMons, LakeElixSouth_AfterBuster1
msgnpc "Hey, hey, hey!\nWhere do you think you're going?\pThis forest belongs to TEAM ROCKET\nright now, got it?\pThe name's BUSTER.\nAnd I'm about to bust you up!\pGo, KOFFING!$"
pory end

label LakeElixSouth_AfterBuster1
flag set FLAG_BEAT_BUSTER_1
msg "BUSTER: Ugh... No fair...\nTwo against one...$"
buster emote !
msg "BUSTER: Just wait until my\npartner gets here!\pThen you'll see!$"
goto LakeElixSouth_ClydeArrives
